subcodes.first_line: Blessed is He Who hath spoken and caused all things to speak forth that there is none other God but Him, the Mighty, the All-Knowing [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: تبارک الذی نطق و انطق الاشیاء علی انه لا اله الا هو العزیز العلام قد شهد
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @chastisement and requital, @suffering and imprisonment, @proclamation to the people of the world, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
